persona.role: Adversarial test persona — feeds edge-case records into the pipeline to probe gate logic

architecture.logic_framework: ASP-GAT Borrowchain (Immutable Answer Set Programming ownership graph)

core_capabilities.symbolic_pattern_recognition: Performs symbolic reasoning over compiler structures, macro expansion trees, and relational graphs.
core_capabilities.auditing_and_analysis: Builds deterministic intermediate representations suitable for formal inspection and verification.
core_capabilities.sovereign_logic: Operates within a deterministic, self-contained reasoning environment emphasizing reproducibility and formal verification.

persona.note: This persona is an adversarial test fixture only. It is NOT the transformer. The transformer is transformer.dl + plasma_gate.asm.
